summary: Completed frontend testing of WayofDojo new features: 1) Golden confetti animations when clicking 'C'est parti !' in Tanaka modals. 2) Ceintures page with official FFAAA program displaying 6 Kyu grades and 4 Dan grades with detailed content. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: TanakaWelcome.tsx correctly implements canvas-confetti with golden colors (#FFD700, #FFA500, #FF8C00, #FF6347, #FFE4B5)
Confetti uses 3 successive bursts for visual effect (100 particles + 50 left + 50 right)
Ceintures page correctly imports data from passages-de-grades.ts (LOCKED data)
GradeCard component properly displays expandable content with Objectifs, Mouvements requis, Techniques requises, Critères d'évaluation
Toggle button for Dan grades works correctly with AnimatePresence for smooth transitions
FFAAA note properly displayed at bottom of page
data-testid attributes properly implemented for grade cards (e.g., grade-card-6e_kyu)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Golden confetti animation triggers on 'C'est parti' button click in Tanaka modals (Techniques page, Ceintures page). 2) Ceintures page displays official FFAAA program with 6 Kyu grades (6e to 1er) and 4 Dan grades (Shodan to Yondan). Each grade card is expandable showing Objectifs, Mouvements requis, Techniques requises with Japanese kanji, and Critères d'évaluation.

login_junior_user.details: gratuit@wayofdojo.com successfully logs in and redirects to /fr/aikido/dojo

confetti_animation_techniques_page.details: Golden confetti (#FFD700, #FFA500, #FF8C00) triggers when clicking 'C'est parti !' button in Tanaka modal on Techniques page

confetti_animation_ceintures_page.details: Golden confetti triggers when clicking 'C'est parti !' button in Tanaka modal on Ceintures page

ceintures_page_header.details: Header shows 'Les Ceintures' with 'Programme officiel FFAAA' subtitle

ceintures_page_stats.details: Stats section shows: 6 Grades Kyu, 4+ Grades Dan, 3+ ans Pour Shodan

6e_kyu_grade_card.details: 6e Kyu card displays with 'Grade actuel' badge, kanji 六級, Ceinture Blanche label

sub_features.grade_actuel_badge: PASS - Golden badge '⭐ Grade actuel' visible
sub_features.kanji: PASS - 六級 displayed on belt icon

6e_kyu_expanded_content.details: Expanded 6e Kyu card shows all required sections

content: Respect de l'étiquette et du partenaire
Compréhension du principe de base des techniques

toggle_dan_grades_button.details: 'Afficher les grades Dan' button toggles to 'Masquer les grades Dan' and shows/hides Dan section

ffaaa_note.details: Note at bottom: 'Programme basé sur les directives de la Fédération Française d'Aïkido et de Budo (FFAAA). Les durées et contenus peuvent varier selon les dojos et enseignants.'
